payload.description: Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan - The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2022 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: M/W Quarterly Update - A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M/W Quarterly Update
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

payload.description: Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2023 - The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan.

payload.description: 2022 Annual Operating Results - A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report - Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

payload.description: 2022 Annual Ridership Report - A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2022 Annual Ridership Report
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

payload.description: Winter Trackwork Programs - This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project. Additionally, trackwork programs will support Switch Maintenance near Valley Stream, and Rail Maintenance on the Wreck Lead Bridge in Island Park.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Winter Trackwork Programs

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project. Additionally, trackwork programs will support Switch Maintenance near Valley Stream, and Rail Maintenance on the Wreck Lead Bridge in Island Park.
